title: ASCII Class ER Graph Layout
problem: Class and ER ASCII renderers previously rejected common multi-relationship layouts because their layout model was single-relation-only.

evidence.result: opened follow-on lane for class/ER multi-relationship terminal graph layout
added parser-backed tracer tests for class multiple relationships and ER unrelated-entity relationship layouts
introduced a shared terminal relationship-graph placement seam used by class and ER single-relationship rendering
implemented layered classDiagram chain and star multi-relationship ASCII rendering with explicit crossing-layout diagnostics
implemented layered erDiagram chain and star multi-relationship ASCII rendering with explicit crossing-layout diagnostics
verified public ASCII API and CLI gates, updated support docs, and closed the lane with dense topology and shared planner extraction follow-ons

continue_policy.notes: Lane is closed. If continuing class/ER ASCII graph layout, open a narrower follow-on for terminal-layout-only shared layered planner extraction or dense/crossing topology routing. Keep color/style, state ASCII, true BT/RL flowchart directions, and richer XYChart layout out of this lane.
